demo.intro: Build a NEET mock test in the wizard, watch the exam hall live, sit the paper as a learner, and let AI grade the answer sheets.

fields.label: Evaluation
fields.value: Automatic · release results after exam ends

rows: Two blocks joined by a string over a frictionless pulley…
Match each physical quantity with its SI unit
A projectile fired at 45° covers what range (in m)?
Explain Kirchhoff's junction rule with one example

items.title: Q34 · Physics
items.sub: A 2 kg block slides down a 30° frictionless incline. Find its acceleration in m/s².

items.title: Priya Sharma
items.sub: Long answers graded · Q4 flagged for review

steps.title: Five exam types, four guided steps
steps.text: One wizard builds Exams, Mock tests, Practice tests, Surveys and Manual-Upload exams where learners submit PDFs or videos. Everything stays in draft until you publish, so nothing goes live by accident.

steps.title: Exam-day rules, decided upfront
steps.text: Set the live window, timed preview, auto- or manual submission, and whether results release automatically or on your say-so. Re-attempt and extra-time requests can be switched on for admin approval.

steps.title: Nine question types, or import Word
steps.text: Mix MCQs, numeric, match-the-following, comprehension passages, even coding questions run against test cases. Or upload a .docx paper — options, answers, images and math formulas convert automatically.

steps.title: See the whole exam hall live
steps.text: While the exam runs, participants split into Attempted, Ongoing and Pending tabs with live counters, search and filters — 186 learners, one glance.

steps.title: Extend, close, remind — in bulk
steps.text: Approve Priya's extra-time request, force-close stragglers, remove no-shows, grant re-attempts and nudge pending learners with reminders — per learner or in bulk, without leaving this console.

steps.title: Timers that never lose an answer
steps.text: Countdowns run at exam, section and question level with auto-submit at expiry. Answers stream to the server continuously — a crash or dropped network loses nothing, and learners resume exactly where they were.

steps.title: A palette built for exam strategy
steps.text: Answered, marked and skipped questions are one tap away, and the institute controls whether learners can move between sections. Tab-switch events are recorded with the attempt for the institute to review.

steps.title: AI grades a classroom in minutes
steps.text: Upload scanned answer sheets and AI reads them — handwriting and math included — applies your rubric, and awards question-wise marks with written feedback. Watch per-student status live, from processing to completed.

steps.title: Teachers keep the final say
steps.text: Every AI mark can be reviewed and overridden, with annotated PDFs anchored to the learner's actual writing. Changed the answer key? Re-evaluate the whole exam or single questions, with an audit log of every regrade.

steps.title: Results learners actually read
steps.text: Release results in bulk or per learner. Each learner gets peer comparison, option-wise distributions, a leaderboard rank and a downloadable AI-narrated report card — with alerts to parents over email, WhatsApp and push.
